summary: Mobile PageSpeed Performance Optimizations Testing - All 14 tests passed (100%). Verified: 1) Home page loads correctly with hero, booking form, stats, destinations, 2) Paris CDG destination card shows driver-paris.webp (56KB optimized image), 3) All 6 destination cards render images correctly, 4) index.html only loads Inter, Manrope, Noto Sans Armenian fonts (IBM Plex removed from Google Fonts link), 5) TripAdvisor widget lazy-loads via IntersectionObserver (script not loaded until scrolled into view), 6) Mobile view (390px) renders correctly, 7) Language switching works for /fr, /ru, /hy URLs, 8) Booking form inputs functional, 9) Destination cards link to correct transfer pages.

notes.item: tailwind.config.js still references IBM Plex fonts in fontFamily definitions
notes.impact: LOW - These are CSS fallback definitions only, not actual font loading. The Google Fonts link in index.html correctly loads only Inter, Manrope, Noto Sans Armenian.
notes.recommendation: Consider updating tailwind.config.js to use Inter instead of IBM Plex Sans for consistency

context_for_next_testing_agent: Performance optimizations verified: 1) WebP image at /images/driver-paris.webp (56KB) loads correctly for Paris CDG destination, 2) TripAdvisor widget uses IntersectionObserver for lazy-loading - jscache.com script only loads when widget scrolls into view, 3) Google Fonts in index.html correctly loads only Inter+Manrope+Noto Sans Armenian (async with media='print' onload pattern). Note: tailwind.config.js still has IBM Plex in fontFamily but this is just CSS fallback, not actual font loading.
